exploration_notes:
The HTTP call chain traces from Grafana to Loki as follows:

**Hop 1 - grafana/grafana HTTP client (`LokiAPI` struct):** In `pkg/tsdb/loki/api.go:29-34`, the `LokiAPI` struct wraps an `*http.Client` and acts as the HTTP client for all Loki queries. It is instantiated via `newLokiAPI()` using the `HTTPClient` from the `datasourceInfo` struct (`pkg/tsdb/loki/loki.go:65-72`). The `makeDataRequest()` function builds the HTTP request targeting `/loki/api/v1/query` for instant queries (line 86), and `
